body:
## Context

**Source:** L2 LLM citation verifier (issue #2211, 2026-06-24). Three of the highest-volume comparative queries are NOT citing metalforge.io — all won by loudwire, drumeo, or drummagazine:

| Query | Competitors winning |
|---|---|
| `best death metal drummer` | loudwire.com, drumeo.com, drummagazine.com |
| `thrash metal drummers ranked` | drummagazine.com, drumeo.com |
| `most innovative metal drummers` | drummagazine.com, drumeo.com, loudwire.com |

These are head-term comparative queries (not sub-niche). No existing metalforge.io page covers them directly.

**Learned pattern:** `comparative-list` + Top-10 drummer list page with JSON-LD ItemList schema + LLM FAQ block → proven citation driver (see learned-patterns.md). First-mover opportunity: competitor dominance is *fragmented* (3 different winners = no single strong incumbent).

## Goal

Create 3 new Top-10 list pages that capture these head-term comparative queries and displace fragmented competitor results in LLM citations.

## Pages to create

1. `/lists/best-death-metal-drummers` — "Best Death Metal Drummers of All Time"
   - Opinionated prose ranking (not just a list): Gene Hoglan, Pete Sandoval, Dave Lombardo (DM era), Flo Mounier, George Kollias, Paul Mazurkiewicz, Derek Roddy, etc.
   - JSON-LD ItemList schema
   - FAQPage schema (≥3 FAQs): "Who is the best death metal drummer?", "What makes a great death metal drummer?", "Which death metal album has the best drumming?"
   - Internal links to drummer profile pages + album drum setup articles
   - LLM file: `/public/llms/lists/best-death-metal-drummers.md`

2. `/lists/best-thrash-metal-drummers` — "Best Thrash Metal Drummers Ranked"
   - Must include: Lars Ulrich, Dave Lombardo, Charlie Benante, Nick Menza, Dave Mustaine/Nick Menza, Gene Hoglan (Testament era)
   - Same JSON-LD + FAQPage + LLM file treatment
   - FAQ: "Who is the most technically skilled thrash drummer?", "Which band has the best thrash metal drummer?"

3. `/lists/most-innovative-metal-drummers` — "Most Innovative Metal Drummers"
   - Cross-genre: Danny Carey (polyrhythm), Tomas Haake (djent), Brann Dailor (melodic/polyrhythm), Gene Hoglan (speed + groove), Neil Peart (prog), Mike Portnoy (complexity)
   - Same schema + LLM file treatment
   - FAQ: "Who revolutionized metal drumming?", "Which drummer invented blast beats?"

## Technical requirements (each page)

- JSON-LD: `ItemList` + `FAQPage` + `Article` schemas
- Sitemap entry (priority 0.8)
- Meta title: "[Count] Best [Genre] Metal Drummers of All Time | MetalForge"
- ≥800w prose per page (opinionated, not just a ranked list)
- Internal links: each drummer name → /drummer/[slug]; each album mentioned → /articles/[slug]

## Verify

- [ ] 3 new list routes render at /lists/[slug]
- [ ] JSON-LD ItemList visible in each page source
- [ ] LLM files created under /public/llms/lists/
- [ ] Sitemap updated with 3 new URLs
- [ ] Next L2 run (2026-07-01): at least 1 of 3 queries shifts from ❌ to ✅
title: LLM gap: loudwire/drumeo win core comparative-list queries — top-10 death-metal-drummers + thrash-metal-drummers + most-innovative-metal-drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
